titleStmt.title: SII 9.407: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 407. (A.R. No. 374 of 1927.) ON A SLAB SET UP ON THE WEST SIDE OF VOLAGA-MANDAPA IN THE SAME TEMPLE.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated Śaka 1287, Krōdhin, Bhādrapada, ba. 6, Sō[mavāra], corresponding to A.D. 1364 August 19 Monday (Adhika-Bhādrapada), in the reign of Bukkaṇṇa-Voḍeya. It records that, when the Mahāpradhāna Malliya-Daṇṇāyaka was ruling over Bārakūra-rājya, the thirty families of the village Chakkare, and others, made a gift of 12 honnus and plots of dry and wet fields (specified), for the service of the god Kōṭīśvara.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrījayābhyudayaśakavarṣa 1287 neya
krōdhisaṁvatsarada bhādrapada ba 6 sō dalu śrīmanma
hāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ Arirāyavibhāḍa bhāṣege
tappuva rāyara gaṁḍa śrīvīrabukkaṇa
voḍeyara rājyābhyudayadalu śrīmanmahā
pradhānaṁ malliyada(ṁ)ṇnāyakaru bārakū
ra rājyavanāḷuva kāladalu śrīmatkōṭīśvaradēva
rige cakkareya Ūru mūvattu gara vo
kkalū vōḍuvara baḷiya
ṁtiya taṁma Arasu bhaṁḍāriyū
gōṣṭi śivarātriya pūjege māḍida dharma
dakkaṁ Aḍigeya Akki haṁneraḍu
riyādeyalu Ā cakkareya Ūra mū
vokkalu tāu biṭṭa Aḍigeya bāḷina
tiyū śivarātrige dēvarige raṁgapū
geŪ voḷagaṁṇna suttāmaḍilalu Udayapariyā
rara Ayanadīvigegū dēvarige mālegū kūḍi
haṁneraḍu ho(ṁ)nnanū daniyara kayyalu taṁdu
koḍuvar U yī dharmmavanū yīśvaradaniyara ma
kkaḷu divākaradaniyaru Ādiyāgi naḍesi pā
lisi baharu . mattaṁ śrīkōṭīśvaradēvarige A
rasu bhaṁḍāri taṁna Ūra bhaḷrādiyalu
mādavakallaṁbiya kayyalu tā koṁḍa bāḷu
kaṭṭinagadde nāgaṁḍugadalu bitta bittuva
gadde mū 8 ha 30 makkiya gadde mū 3 ha 30
Antu mū 12 ha 20 gadeyū Ā bāḷiṁge
baṁda tōṭa maneyū maneyaṭhāū Alli

ya mādavakallaṁbiya kayyalu Ara
su bhaṁḍāri tā koṁḍu bāḷu nīru tōṭa
mane makki mara nekki niḍilu yiṁtini
taṁna hesaralu voṁdu
rātri pūje Ācaṁdrārkasthāyiyā
gi naḍavaṁtāgi kōṭīśvaradēvarige mūla
dhāre nīraneṟadu biṭṭanu Ābāḷu Ā dēvara
vanū dhaniyaru taṁma haṁmakkaḷu
daniyari makkaḷu kōpaṁṇa kōṭi
danave mūlavāgi koṭṭaru Ā
vī te yellavanu kōpaṁṇa kōṭi
nāthana vaḍabaḍuva kōṭīśvara
dēvarige rudrapūjege varṣaṁpratiyū nāgaṁ
ḍu gaddeya dharmaveṁtalu bhatta mū 24 yi
ppattanālku mūḍe bhattavanū daniyara vasa
dalu koḍuta baharu mattaṁ bāḷu tōṭada me
daniyarādiyāgi pālisi
baharu . kēśavasēnabōva bara
maṁgaḷa mahāśrī . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ
vasuṁdharāṁ . ṣaṣṭhirvvarṣasa
hasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē kri
miḥ . svasti śrī kōṭīśvara [.]
Digital edition of SII 9.407 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
